eyebrow.zh: 零配置 · 离线 · 每次结果一致
eyebrow.en: Zero-config · Offline · Same result every run

headline.zh:
AI 写了一半你的代码，现在你维护它
一个分数 + 一张热力图，看清债有多重、藏在哪
headline.en:
Your AI agents wrote half your code. Now you maintain it.
One score + one heatmap — see how bad, and where.

sub.zh: 过得了 lint、编译也没错的代码，也可能是 AI 塞给你的债。一条命令扫整个仓库，给你一个 0–100 的分数和一张按文件排序的热力图——债有多重、藏在哪几个文件，一眼看到。不用装、不联网、不用 API key。
sub.en: Code that passes lint and compiles can still be AI-generated debt you'll be untangling. One command scans your whole repo and returns a 0–100 score plus a ranked per-file heatmap — how bad it is, and which files. No install, no network, no API key.

title.zh: 先知道有多烂，再知道烂在哪
title.en: Know how bad. Then know where.

body.zh: 一个 0–100 的分数量化整个仓库的 AI 代码债；一张按文件排序的热力图直接指向最该清理的几个文件。每条发现都带可读证据（比如「4 层包装、只有一个调用者」），是你能核对的分诊单，不是黑盒结论。
body.en: A 0–100 score sizes up the AI debt across your whole repo; a ranked heatmap points straight at the files most worth cleaning. Every finding comes with plain-language evidence (e.g. "4-deep wrapper, only one caller") — a triage sheet you can verify, not a black-box verdict.

title.zh: 抓的是 AI 特有的乱，不是代码风格
title.en: Catches the mess AI leaves, not your style

body.zh: 多层套娃却只有一个调用者的包装、复制粘贴的脚手架、吞掉异常的空 catch、加进来却从没被读到的参数、轻改一下的近似重复块——这些都是过得了 ESLint、编译也通过的代码，但要你来解的结。不是风格、不是 bug，是 AI 高产的那种债。
body.en: Deep wrapper chains with a single caller, copy-pasted scaffolds, empty catches that swallow errors, parameters added but never read, near-duplicate blocks lightly edited — all lint-clean, all compiles, yet knots only a human can untangle. Not style, not bugs: the specific debt AI over-produces.

chips: › 只抓 AI 高产的乱

title.zh: 一行命令卡住 PR，不让债继续涨
title.en: Gate a PR in one line — stop the debt growing

body.zh: 在 CI 里加一行，分数一过你设的门槛就让 job 失败，把烂代码挡在合并之外。不用搭服务、不用开账号。装成 GitHub Action 后，分数和最脏的文件写进 job summary，每条发现还会落到 PR diff 的对应行上——指到具体哪一行该清理。
body.en: Add one line to CI and the job fails the moment the score crosses your threshold, blocking sloppy code from merging — no service, no account. Packaged as a GitHub Action, the score and worst files land in the job summary, and each finding is pinned to the exact line of the PR diff — the line to clean.

title.zh: 不装、不联网、每次分数都一样
title.en: No install, no network, same score every time

body.zh: 一条 npx slopaudit . 就跑，不用装、不用配。整个扫描在本地完成——你的代码不离开机器、不用 API key、不用账号。同一个仓库每次跑出来的分数完全一致，两分钟内给你终端报告、一张自包含的 HTML 热力图和一个能贴进 README 的徽章。
body.en: One command — npx slopaudit . — nothing to install or configure. The whole scan runs locally — your code never leaves your machine, no API key, no account. The same repo scores identically every run, giving you a terminal report, a self-contained HTML heatmap and a README-ready badge in under two minutes.

headline.en: Measure it before you clean it

sub.zh: 免费、开源(Apache-2.0)、离线。个人与开源项目永久免费，一条命令拿到分数。
sub.en: Free, open source (Apache-2.0), offline. Free forever for individuals and OSS — one command to get your score.

tag.zh: 给 AI 写进你仓库的代码债打分
tag.en: Score the code debt AI wrote into your repo
